vocab.expy: Wǒ zài zhǎo wǒ de shǒujī.
Nǐ kàn zhuōzi shàng le ma?
vocab.ex_en: Did you look on the table?

vocab.expy: Zhuōzi shàng zhǐ yǒu shū hé bēizi.
vocab.ex_uz: Stol ustida faqat kitob va stakan bor.
vocab.ex_ru: На столе только книги и чашка.
vocab.ex_en: There are only books and a cup on the table.

vocab.expy: Shūbāo lǐ yě méi yǒu. Zěnme bàn?
vocab.ex_ru: В рюкзаке тоже нет. Что делать?
vocab.ex_en: It's not in the backpack either. What should I do?

vocab.expy: Bié zháojí. Wǒ gěi nǐ dǎ diànhuà.
vocab.ex_uz: Xavotir olma. Men senga qo'ng'iroq qilaman.
vocab.ex_en: Don't worry. I'll call your phone.

vocab.ex: 以后上课的时候，手机要放好。
vocab.expy: Yǐhòu shàng kè de shíhòu, shǒujī yào fàng hǎo.
vocab.ex_uz: Bundan keyin dars vaqtida telefonni joyiga qo'y.
vocab.ex_ru: В следующий раз на уроке убирай телефон.
vocab.ex_en: From now on, during class, put your phone away.

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zài zhǎo wǒ de shǒu jī.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ kàn zhuō zi shàng le ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Did you look on the table?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 看了，不在。桌子上只有书和杯子。
sentences.pinyin: Kàn le, bú zài. Zhuō zi shàng zhǐ yǒu shū hé bēi zi.
sentences.text_translation: Qaradim, yo'q. Stol ustida faqat kitob va stakan bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Смотрел, нет. На столе только книги и чашка.
sentences.text_translation_en: I did, it's not there. There are only books and a cup on the table.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Shū bāo lǐ yě méi yǒu. Zěn me bàn?
sentences.text_translation_ru: В рюкзаке тоже нет. Что делать?
sentences.text_translation_en: It's not in the backpack either. What should I do?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Bié zháo jí. Wǒ gěi nǐ dǎ diàn huà.
sentences.text_translation: Xavotir olma. Men senga qo'ng'iroq qilaman.
sentences.text_translation_en: Don't worry. I'll call your phone.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ tīng, shǒu jī zài xiǎng.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 啊！在我后口袋里。找到了！
sentences.pinyin: A! Zài wǒ hòu kǒu dài lǐ. Zhǎo dào le!
sentences.text_translation_ru: А! Он в заднем кармане. Нашёл!
sentences.text_translation_en: Ah! It's in my back pocket. Found it!
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 以后上课的时候，手机要放好。
sentences.pinyin: Yǐ hòu shàng kè de shí hòu, shǒu jī yào fàng hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Bundan keyin dars vaqtida telefonni yaxshilab joyiga qo'y.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В следующий раз на уроке убирай телефон как следует.
sentences.text_translation_en: From now on, during class, put your phone away properly.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Zhī dào le. Xiè xiè nǐ.
sentences.speaker: B
